prevalence.trend: stable; associated with smoking, pollution, and TB sequelae

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant QOL and sleep impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Cough >8 weeks; evaluate common causes and exclude TB and malignancy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care evaluation; chest imaging and sputum testing if TB suspected
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause (asthma, GERD, postnasal drip), smoking cessation
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High pollution exposure and delayed evaluation in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong TB control programs and primary care access
